inputs.label: Number of Files
inputs.businessContext: Total count of files to store or transfer

businessContext_i18n.en: Total count of files to store or transfer
businessContext_i18n.tr: Depolanacak veya aktarılacak toplam dosya sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der zu speichernden oder zu übertragenden Dateien
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de fichiers à stocker ou transférer
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de archivos a almacenar o transferir
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الملفات المراد تخزينها أو نقلها

inputs.label: Size per File
inputs.businessContext: Average size of each file in megabytes

businessContext_i18n.en: Average size of each file in megabytes
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir dosyanın megabayt cinsinden ortalama boyutu
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille moyenne de chaque fichier en mégaoctets
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño promedio de cada archivo en megabytes.

inputs.label: Redundancy Factor
inputs.businessContext: Storage overhead factor for redundancy, e.g., RAID 5 = 1.2

businessContext_i18n.en: Storage overhead factor for redundancy, e.g., RAID 5 = 1.2
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yedeklilik için depolama ek yükü faktörü, örn. RAID 5 = 1,2
businessContext_i18n.de: Speicher-Overhead-Faktor für Redundanz, z. B. RAID 5 = 1,2
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de surcharge de stockage pour la redondance, ex. RAID 5 = 1,2
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de sobrecarga de almacenamiento por redundancia, ej., RAID 5 = 1.2

inputs.label: Compression Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Expected compression ratio between 0 and 1 (1 = no compression)

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected compression ratio between 0 and 1 (1 = no compression)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 ile 1 arasında beklenen sıkıştırma oranı (1 = sıkıştırma yok)
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartetes Kompressionsverhältnis zwischen 0 und 1 (1 = keine Kompression)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de compression attendu entre 0 et 1 (1 = pas de compression)
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de compresión esperada entre 0 y 1 (1 = sin compresión)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الضغط المتوقعة بين 0 و1 (1 = بدون ضغط)

inputs.label: Filesystem Overhead
inputs.businessContext: Filesystem metadata overhead per file in kilobytes

businessContext_i18n.en: Filesystem metadata overhead per file in kilobytes
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dosya başına kilobayt cinsinden dosya sistemi meta veri ek yükü
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surcharge des métadonnées du système de fichiers par fichier en kilo-octets
businessContext_i18n.es: Sobrecarga de metadatos del sistema de archivos por archivo en kilobytes
businessContext_i18n.ar: النفقات العامة لبيانات تعريف نظام الملفات لكل ملف بالكيلوبايت

inputs.label: Network Transfer Speed
inputs.businessContext: Network speed in megabits per second for download/upload time estimation

businessContext_i18n.en: Network speed in megabits per second for download/upload time estimation
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirme/yükleme süresi tahmini için megabit/saniye cinsinden ağ hızı
businessContext_i18n.de: Netzwerkgeschwindigkeit in Megabit pro Sekunde für Download-/Upload-Zeitschätzung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse réseau en mégabits par seconde pour l'estimation du temps de téléchargement/téléversement
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de red en megabits por segundo para estimación de tiempo de descarga/subida
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة الشبكة بالميغابت في الثانية لتقدير وقت التحميل/التنزيل

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
